name: python-reference-counter
description: Show Python function / method / class reference counts via CodeLens (PyCharm style).

pythonReferenceCounter.showZeroReference.description: Show CodeLens even when there are zero references

enumDescriptions: Count references for both classes and functions/methods
Count references for class definitions only
Count references for functions and methods only
pythonReferenceCounter.enableFor.description: Which Python symbols to show reference counts for

pythonReferenceCounter.enableFallbackWor.description: Safety net for when no Python language server resolves a symbol (e.g. the Python/Pylance extension is missing or still indexing): perform a naive workspace-wide text scan. Slower and may include false positives. When a language server returns results, those are always used and this scan is skipped.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint

comment:overrides: Pin patched transitive versions of dev/build tooling deps. minimatch is intentionally NOT overridden: @vscode/vsce needs minimatch ^3.0.3 (default-export API), and the ReDoS fix was backported to 3.1.5, which resolves naturally.
